title: Poko
description: Minecraft Mod Pack aims to balance performance and ability with vanilla compatibility!
body:
[Documentation]:https://img.shields.io/badge/-Documentation-blue.svg?logo=Wikipedia&style=for-the-badge&logoColor=black
[Discord]:https://img.shields.io/badge/-Discord-5865F2.svg?logo=discord&style=for-the-badge&logoColor=white
[GH]:https://img.shields.io/badge/-Github-black.svg?logo=github&style=for-the-badge&logoColor=white
[ModsCount]:https://img.shields.io/github/directory-file-count/The-Simples/Poko/mods?extension=toml&label=Mods&type=file
[ModList]:https://img.shields.io/github/directory-file-count/The-Simples/Poko/mods?extension=toml&label=Mod-List&type=file&style=for-the-badge

![banner.jpg](https://s2.loli.net/2022/07/06/lwZFHQB9hbzqRyV.jpg)
Poko is an ModPack dedicated to compatibility with the vanilla server, committed to introducing elegant tools and maintaining high performance, providing you with a highly customized gaming experience.

        
[![GH]](https://github.com/The-Simples/Poko)
[![Discord]](https://discord.gg/dCVkjehCFS)
[![Documentation]](https://poko-mc.netlify.app/)
[![ModList]](https://poko-mc.netlify.app/mod-list)

**Examples speak louder than words**, Lead me to [showcases](https://poko-mc.vercel.app/guide/#showcases)!
- **It's fast.** --- Even there are lots of mods in this mod pack, it still can load very fast.
- **Reserve modifications space and practical priority** --- We added many useful tweaks that you wouldn't notice, and we did **Not** add mods like `Map/Litematica/IBE Editor...`, because we want to let it be your choice.
- **Almost full OptiFine Support** --- Thanks to awesome mod creators, Now you can enjoy `Shaders, ResoucePack, Connected textures, PBR, Custom Model...` on Fabric/Quilt Loaders!
- **The pursuit of experience, but abide by the principles** --- We avoid adding other visual effects to f**k your FPS, but we still recommend [those mods](https://poko-mc.vercel.app/recommend) for you!(But you need a GOOD PC)
- **Highly pre-configured** ---All we want for you, is you can configure everything you see in the game, even disable it or make it personalize.
- **We know your pain** --- We don't do the whole fancy, You can modify anything comfortably. Thanks to awesome mod creators, you can `type command in portals`, `switch languages in 1s`,  `resize scoreboard/bossbar/actionbar` and do more things with these comfortable modifications!
- **~~Fully Documented~~** --- **Not Yet**, We want to tell how to configure everything as you want, but it's a big work, so **coming soon**!

## 🎁 Credits
- **Mod** --- Please check our [Mod List](https://poko-mc.vercel.app/mod-list), we link 
**every mods** to its origin pages. Without these awesome creators, this mod pack would not exist!
- [**Eclectic Trove**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eclectic-trove-legendary-tooltips/) --- Created by Grend_G, A resource pack enriches your tooltips!
- [**GUI Retextures**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/gui-retextures) --- Created by flatjim_ , make Minecraft's GUIs look a bit more vibrant and interesting.
